data.name: Hentai Beach
data.detailed_description:
Allow yourself to relax and unleash all your secret fantasies in a wonderful game - Hentai Beach. Plunge into an incredible endless adventure with beautiful girls on a sunny beach away from the hustle and bustle. The girls are looking forward to meeting you, but can you charm them?

Features:

  • Classic clicker game with endless gameplay.
  • Slap girls on the buttocks to win their love and earn hearts.
  • Spend the earned hearts to call cute animals to your aid.
  • Increase your level with every click and pump your abilities!
  • 9 cute girls in swimsuits will not let you get bored! And if you press the red heart, the swimwear disappears somewhere...
  • Lots of colorful backgrounds and original soundtrack
  • MODE WITHOUT HANDS !!! (Free your hands to fully enjoy the game)
  • 69 Achievements that will show how cool you are!
  • Build your success on the leaderboard or compete with other players for the title of the best!

data.short_description: Plunge into an incredible endless adventure with beautiful girls on a sunny beach away from the hustle and bustle. The girls are looking forward to meeting you, but can you charm them?
data.supported_languages: 英文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 韓文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-4570 / AMD FX-9590 or better
  • 記憶體: 8 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 660 2GB / AMD R9 280 better
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7-4790 or AMD Ryzen 3 3200G
  • 記憶體: 16 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 1060 / AMD R9 Fury
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7 / 10
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-4570 / AMD FX-9590 or better
  • Memory: 8 MB RAM
  • Graphics: GTX 660 2GB / AMD R9 280 better
  • Storage: 200 MB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS *: Windows 7 / 10
  • Processor: Intel Core i7-4790 or AMD Ryzen 3 3200G
  • Memory: 16 MB RAM
  • Graphics: GTX 1060 / AMD R9 Fury
  • Storage: 200 MB available space
